# terrible_community_docker_docker_image_remove (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Image name. Name format will be one of: `name`, `repository/name`, `registry_server:port/name`. When pushing or pulling an image the name can optionally include the tag by appending `:tag_name`. Note that image IDs (hashes) can also be used.

### Optional

- `force` (Boolean) Un-tag and remove all images matching the specified name.
- `prune` (Boolean) Delete untagged parent images.
- `tag` (String) Tag for the image name `name` that is to be tagged. If `name`'s format is `name:tag`, then the tag value from `name` will take precedence.

### Read-Only

- `deleted` (String) The digests of the images that were deleted.
- `image` (String) Image inspection results for the affected image before removal. Empty if the image was not found.
- `untagged` (String) The digests of the images that were untagged.
